iron_fists.name: Iron Fists
iron_fists.description: Unarmed attacks deal +2 damage. Your hands are registered weapons.

deadeye.name: Deadeye
deadeye.description: Ranged attack rolls gain +2. You don't miss twice.

streetfighter.name: Streetfighter
streetfighter.description: Critical hit threshold lowered by 2. You know where it hurts.

sucker_punch.name: Sucker Punch
sucker_punch.description: First attack each combat deals +3 damage. Catch them off guard.

blood_money.name: Blood Money
blood_money.description: Earn $10 cash for each enemy killed. It's just business.

black_market.name: Black Market
black_market.description: Sell contraband 15% above market price. You know the right buyers.

silk_tongue.name: Silk Tongue
silk_tongue.description: Bribery score +3. Your words are smoother than good bourbon.

numbers_runner.name: Numbers Runner
numbers_runner.description: Delivery job cash reward +20%. You've run every route in KC.

bulk_buyer.name: Bulk Buyer
bulk_buyer.description: Purchase contraband 15% cheaper. You buy in volume.

nest_egg.name: Nest Egg
nest_egg.description: +$25 bonus cash on each successful job. Always squirrel something away.

protection_money.name: Protection Money
protection_money.description: +$15 per turn from controlled territory. Let the cash come to you.

ghost.name: Ghost
ghost.description: Heat generated from combat reduced by 25%. You leave no witnesses.

friends_in_low_places.name: Friends in Low Places
friends_in_low_places.description: Heat passive decay +5 per chapter. You've got friends on the inside.

crooked_badge.name: Crooked Badge
crooked_badge.description: Raid threshold raised from 80 to 95. Someone at the precinct owes you.

light_fingers.name: Light Fingers
light_fingers.description: Pick up items from adjacent tiles without stepping on them.

vanish.name: Vanish
vanish.description: Once per run: instantly reduce heat to zero. Press [v] to activate.

clean_hands.name: Clean Hands
clean_hands.description: Bribery jobs never increase heat on success. Plausible deniability.

natural_politician.name: Natural Politician
natural_politician.description: All faction rep gains +10%. You know how to work a room.

street_rep.name: Street Rep
street_rep.description: Rep loss on failed jobs halved. Rumors die fast on your block.

good_boss.name: Good Boss
good_boss.description: Crew loyalty +10 after each completed job. They'd take a bullet for you.

well_connected.name: Well Connected
well_connected.description: Hire candidate pool shows +2 extra candidates (6 total).

word_gets_around.name: Word Gets Around
word_gets_around.description: All factions gain +2 rep on each level-up. Your name means something.

made_man.name: Made Man
made_man.description: Immune to rep loss below 25 in any faction. They need you too much.
